description_long: This house is a modern, boxy residential structure with a predominantly white exterior and flat rooflines. It is situated on a large, T-shaped green lawn, suggesting a suburban or semi-urban setting. The building features multiple levels, with the main entrance visible on one side, accented by a wooden door and a small overhang. Windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, with some large panes and others smaller, providing a contemporary aesthetic. The house appears to have a clean, minimalist design with little exterior ornamentation. The overall impression is of a recently constructed, functional family home with ample outdoor space.
description: A modern, white, multi-level house with flat roofs and asymmetrical windows, set on a large T-shaped green lawn.
description_view_0: The house is seen from the side, showing the main building mass on the left and the expansive green lawn extending to the right.
description_view_1: The house is viewed from the front, revealing the main entrance, a wooden door, and the layered structure of the building.
description_view_2: The house is on the right, with the long stretch of green lawn extending to the left, highlighting the building's flat roof.
description_view_3: A direct view of the house's front, showing the entryway, multiple stories, and the T-shaped lawn extending outward.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a wooden door, small overhang, and minimal decorative elements
